Our Mission

Built to Represent.
Built to Last.

Friends of Team Armenia Basketball is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit focused on building, strengthening, and sustaining a national team basketball program — while developing the sport of basketball throughout Armenia. We compete in FIBA events annually and recruit the most talented Armenian players worldwide.

Humility
Representing a nation with grace, on and off the court.
Resilience
Competing with determination against any opponent.
Competitive Spirit
Striving to win, always pushing for more.
Perseverance
Building a lasting legacy for Armenian basketball.
FIBA European Champions
European Championship for Small Countries · 2022
FIBA Certified 501(c)(3) Nonprofit Tax Deductible

The Case for Sponsorship

Why Sponsor Armenia Basketball?

You don't need to know basketball to benefit from this. You need to know your customers. The Armenian community in Los Angeles is over 200,000 strong, deeply connected, and incredibly loyal to brands that show up for them. A sponsorship with Armenia Basketball puts your name in front of that audience at one of the most exciting live events of the year — and keeps it there all season long through our digital and social reach.

👥
A Loyal Audience

The Armenian community doesn't just attend — they show up. 6,000+ fans every game, millions of impressions online. These are real people who remember the brands that support their culture.

📣
Year-Round Visibility

This isn't a one-day ad buy. Your brand gets consistent exposure through social media, broadcast, in-arena signage, and our website — before, during, and after game day.

💰
Tax Deductible

Every dollar you invest is fully tax deductible through our 501(c)(3) status. You get brand exposure, community goodwill, and a tax benefit — all in one partnership.

Sponsorship Tiers

Partnership Packages

All contributions are fully tax-deductible through our 501(c)(3) nonprofit status. Choose the level of partnership that fits your goals.

Supporting Sponsor
Bronze
$5,000
Ideal for brands looking to gain exposure and be part of a high-energy international event.
Brand Exposure
  • Rotational logo placement on in-arena LED board
  • Logo placement on ArmeniaBasketball.com
Broadcast & In-Game
  • 2 commercial spots on Zartonk Media broadcast
  • 2 PA announcements during the game
Experience & Access
  • 4 lower-level VIP tickets
  • Bring 4 guests to an Armenia Basketball practice
  • Armenia Basketball merchandise care package
Become a Bronze Sponsor
Official Sponsor
Silver
$10,000
Built for brands looking for stronger visibility, digital exposure, and direct fan engagement.
Brand Exposure
  • Rotational logo on in-arena LED board
  • Logo on step & repeat backdrop (arena)
  • Logo placement on ArmeniaBasketball.com
  • Featured in monthly newsletter
Broadcast & In-Game
  • 4 commercial spots on Zartonk Media broadcast
  • 4 PA announcements during the game
Digital & Social
  • Biweekly sponsored posts leading up to June games
  • 2 dedicated social media posts featuring your brand
Experience & Access
  • 2 courtside tickets + 4 VIP tickets
  • Bring 4 guests to a team practice
  • Sponsor meet & greet with players and coaching staff
  • Armenia Basketball merchandise care package
Become a Silver Sponsor
Premier Sponsor
Gold
$25,000
Maximum visibility, premium in-arena exposure, digital promotion, and direct access to the Armenia Basketball community.
Brand Exposure
  • Rotational logo on in-arena LED board
  • Branded signage & banner placement inside the arena
  • Logo on step-and-repeat, website, team gear, and court
  • Featured in monthly newsletter
  • Official [Industry] Sponsor designation
Broadcast & In-Game
  • 6 commercial spots on Zartonk Media broadcast
  • 6 PA announcements during the game
Digital & Social
  • Weekly sponsored posts leading up to June 27
  • 2 dedicated social media posts featuring your brand
  • Opportunity to collaborate on custom sponsor content
Premium Experience & Access
  • 4 courtside tickets + 8 VIP tickets per game
  • Bring 4 guests to an Armenia Basketball practice
  • Meet-and-greet with players and coaching staff
  • Exclusive dinner with the team & Coach Rex Kalamian
  • Armenia Basketball merchandise care package
  • Opportunity to provide branded giveaways at the event
Become a Gold Sponsor

All donations are fully tax-deductible. Friends of Team Armenia Basketball is a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.

Beyond the Logo

We Help You Show Up Right

Sponsoring Armenia Basketball isn't just a placement — it's a creative partnership. We work with sponsors to make sure your brand looks great across every touchpoint.

🎨
Creative & Design

We can design custom sponsor graphics, social media assets, and branded materials tailored to your brand identity.

📸
Photography & Video

Professional game-day photography and video content featuring your brand alongside the team, ready for your own channels.

📱
Social Media Content

Co-branded posts, stories, and reels crafted to perform well — we handle the content so you can focus on your business.

🤝
Community Activation

We help you connect authentically with the Armenian community — one of the most loyal and tight-knit audiences in Los Angeles.

🎯
Brand Strategy

Not sure how to maximize your sponsorship? We'll work with you to develop a plan that drives real results for your brand.

✨
Custom Packages

Every brand is different. Let's build a sponsorship that fits your goals, budget, and timeline — we're flexible and collaborative.

Ready to build something great together?

Book a free consultation and let's talk about how we can make your brand shine.
